call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about consolidating some credit card debt. 
Agent: Excellent! That's a very smart move. With this loan, you'd have one fixed monthly payment, and potentially save a significant amount on interest. The monthly payment would be around $200. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that sounds pretty good. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed, right? 
Agent: Absolutely. 8.99% for the life of the loan. 
Eleanor: Alright, I think I'm ready to move forward. 
Agent: Fantastic! Let's just verify a few details...

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: (Sighs) Where did you get my number? I've already told someone from your company to stop calling. 
Agent: I apologize for that, sir. We're just trying to offer you a card with a low introductory rate. We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 19.99% after the introductory period. 
Robert: 19.99%? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers rewards points and… 
Robert: No, thank you. I'm not interested. And please, take me off your list. I'm getting too many calls. 
Agent: Okay, sir. I understand. I'll make a note of that. Have a good day. (Click)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a Personal Loan. I understand you were referred by our partner, GreenTech Solutions? 
Jessica: Yeah, that's right. They said you guys might be able to help me with some funding for my business. 
Agent: Absolutely! We specialize in loans for entrepreneurs. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. What are you planning to use the funds for? 
Jessica: I need to buy some new equipment. It's pretty expensive. 
Agent: I understand. This loan could cover that easily. The monthly payments would be around $330. 
Jessica: Hmm, that's a little higher than I was hoping for. I need to shop around a bit more. 
Agent: Of course. I can email you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms, including the repayment schedule. Would that be helpful? 
Jessica: Yeah, that would be great. Thanks. 
Agent: No problem. I'll send that over right away. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

Agent: Good afternoon, Mr. Brown. This is Lisa with Finance Solutions. I see you expressed interest in our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Yeah, I was just looking at different options. 
Agent: Excellent. We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 10.49%. It comes with a generous rewards program and travel insurance. 
Michael: That sounds good, but I have a card with Chase already. Their rewards are pretty good. 
Agent: I understand. However, our card offers 2% cashback on all purchases, while Chase's rewards are tiered. Plus, we have no foreign transaction fees. 
Michael: Hmm, that's a good point. I travel a lot for work. What about the annual fee? 
Agent: The annual fee is $99, but it's waived for the first year. And the value of the cashback and travel insurance typically outweighs the fee. 
Michael: Okay. What's the credit limit increase policy like? 
Agent: You can request a credit limit increase after six months of responsible use. We review each request individually. 
Michael: Alright. I think I'm willing to give it a try. What do I need to do? 
Agent: Wonderful! Let's just confirm your address and a few other details. Then I'll process the application. It should only take a few minutes.

Agent: Hello Mrs. Davis? This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) Oh, for goodness sake! Not again! You people called me yesterday, and the day before! Where did you even get my number? I told you I'm not interested! 
Agent: I apologize for the inconvenience, ma'am. We are pre-approving you for an $8,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 22.99%... 
Patricia: 22.99?! Are you kidding me? I'm going to report you to the Better Business Bureau! This is harassment! (Click)
